name: P&L Bot (Telegram)
description: Read-only Telegram service: message 'pnl' (or balance/positions) and it replies with IBKR + OANDA NAV/cash, day P&L, and each open position's unrealized $ and % gain/loss. Lets you check P&L without logging into TWS elsewhere (which kills the local gateway). Responds only to your TELEGRAM_CHAT_ID; places no orders. Creds auto-loaded from the bots' .env.launcher.

modes.label: Run
modes.description: Start the P&L Telegram listener (long-running). Then message 'pnl' anytime.
